channel.title: Posts on Akila Welihinda
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Akila Welihinda

item.title: Exploring SIMD performance improvements in Web Assembly
item.description: In this blog post, we are going to run some SIMD (Single Instruction Multiple Data) performance experiments in Web Assembly and see whether the results agree with our theoretical predictions.

item.title: Click: My Primary Kubernetes Tool
item.description: Click has made my Kubernetes experience a pleasure. I adopted Click after joining Databricks because using kubectl was too inconvenient. There aren’t many articles or blog posts discussing Click, so I decided to write one in hopes of convincing you to try it out.

item.title: My Journey at Databricks
item.description: Finding Databricks When I was working on the batch scheduling team at Facebook, I noticed something unusual about our sister team.
